1.description: get Stavanger municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: inspect distinct arjordbr codes in AR50

3.description: read AR50 polygons (ogc_fid, wkb_geometry, arjordbr) for spatial filtering

4.description: reduce AR50 to polygons that intersect Stavanger municipality

6.description: keep only AR50 polygons that represent agricultural land using arjordbr code(s)

7.description: find teig that intersect agricultural AR50 polygons

8.description: collapse to one row per teig (group by teigid)

9.description: sort teig rows by teigid ascending

2.sql: SELECT DISTINCT arjordbr FROM public."0000_25833_ar50_gdb__ar50" a WHERE ST_Intersects(a.wkb_geometry, (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer='1103')) ORDER BY arjordbr;

1.description: get Stavanger municipality number and geometry

2.description: inspect distinct category columns (arjordbr, artype) to identify agricultural code

3.description: get parcels (teig) in Stavanger filtered by kommunenummer

4.description: select AR50 polygons for agricultural land filtered by the identified code (no municipality spatial filter yet)

5.description: reduce agricultural AR50 polygons to Stavanger extent by intersecting with kommune geometry

6.description: find teig that intersect the reduced agricultural AR50 polygons

7.description: deduplicate teig, sort by teigid ascending and return top 10
